description: You are a Bioinformatics Scientist analyzing a Genotyping-by-Sequencing (GBS) dataset of the plant pathogen Phytophthora infestans. Using the raw VCF file at /home/ga/RProjects/datasets/phytophthora_raw.vcf.gz, filter the variants to remove those with > 20% missing data or a mean read depth (DP) < 5 across all samples. Create a summary CSV at /home/ga/RProjects/output/variant_qc_summary.csv with exactly one row and two columns, 'original_variants' and 'filtered_variants', containing the variant counts. Perform a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) on the filtered data and save a scatter plot of PC1 vs PC2 to /home/ga/RProjects/output/population_pca.png. Write the complete R script to /home/ga/RProjects/variant_analysis.R. Login: username=ga, password=password123. RStudio is open.

metadata.dataset_source: Phytophthora infestans GBS data (vcfR package example dataset)
metadata.task_note: Requires vcfR and adegenet packages for VCF parsing and genlight conversion
